member.name: F:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.AutoScrollListBoxBehavior.IsEnabledProperty
member.summary: \brief Attached property to enable/disable auto-scroll.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.AutoScrollListBoxBehavior.SetIsEnabled(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Boolean)
member.summary: \brief Sets whether auto-scroll is enabled for the target ListBox.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.AutoScrollListBoxBehavior.GetIsEnabled(System.Windows.DependencyObject)
member.summary: \brief Gets whether auto-scroll is enabled for the target ListBox.
member.returns: True if enabled

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.AutoScrollListBoxBehavior.OnIsEnabledChanged(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Windows.DependencyPropertyChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: \brief Called when IsEnabled changes.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.AutoScrollListBoxBehavior.OnLoaded(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: \brief Loaded handler to attach to ItemsSource changes.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.AutoScrollListBoxBehavior.OnUnloaded(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: \brief Unloaded handler to detach events.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.AutoScrollListBoxBehavior.Attach(System.Windows.Controls.ListBox)
member.summary: \brief Attaches collection changed event to ItemsSource.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.AutoScrollListBoxBehavior.Detach(System.Windows.Controls.ListBox)
member.summary: \brief Detaches previous subscription if any.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.AutoScrollListBoxBehavior.ScrollToLast(System.Windows.Controls.ListBox)
member.summary: \brief Scrolls to the last item in the ListBox.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeMode
member.summary: \brief 숫자 범위 위반 시 처리 모드.

member.name: F:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeMode.Clamp
member.summary: \brief 범위 밖이면 자동 보정(Clamp)

member.name: F:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeMode.Reject
member.summary: \brief 범위 밖이면 마지막 유효값으로 되돌림(Reject)

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior
member.summary: \brief TextBox에 부착해 숫자 범위를 강제하는 Attached Behavior. \details ViewModel/Model 수정 없이 UX 레벨에서 안전한 입력을 보장합니다.

member.name: F:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.IsEnabledProperty
member.summary: \brief 동작 활성화 여부 (기본: false)

member.name: F:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.MinProperty
member.summary: \brief 최소값(미설정 시 제한 없음)

member.name: F:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.MaxProperty
member.summary: \brief 최대값(미설정 시 제한 없음)

member.name: F:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.ModeProperty
member.summary: \brief 범위 밖 처리 모드(Clamp/Reject)

member.name: F:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.LastValidTextProperty
member.summary: \brief 마지막 유효 텍스트 내부 저장용(DP)

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.SetIsEnabled(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Boolean)
member.summary: \brief Getter/Setter

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.GetIsEnabled(System.Windows.DependencyObject)
member.summary: \brief Getter/Setter

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.SetMin(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: \brief Getter/Setter

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.GetMin(System.Windows.DependencyObject)
member.summary: \brief Getter/Setter

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.SetMax(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: \brief Getter/Setter

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.GetMax(System.Windows.DependencyObject)
member.summary: \brief Getter/Setter

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.SetMode(System.Windows.DependencyObject,Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeMode)
member.summary: \brief Getter/Setter

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.GetMode(System.Windows.DependencyObject)
member.summary: \brief Getter/Setter

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.OnIsEnabledChanged(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Windows.DependencyPropertyChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: \brief IsEnabled 변경 시 핸들러 연결/해제.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.Tb_Loaded(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: \brief 초기 로드시 현재 텍스트를 유효값으로 저장.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.OnPasting(System.Object,System.Windows.DataObjectPastingEventArgs)
member.summary: \brief 붙여넣기 시에도 검증/보정 수행.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.Tb_TextChanged(System.Object,System.Windows.Controls.TextChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: \brief 입력 중 보정(Clamp 모드일 때만 실시간 보정). \details Reject는 LostFocus에서 되돌리는 것이 UX가 부드럽습니다.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.Tb_LostFocus(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: \brief 포커스 아웃 시 최종 검증: Clamp 또는 Reject 반영, 그리고 바인딩 원본 업데이트.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.GetFutureText(System.Windows.Controls.TextBox,System.String)
member.summary: \brief 현재 텍스트에 삽입했을 때 미래 텍스트 계산.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Behaviors.NumericRangeBehavior.TryValidate(System.Windows.Controls.TextBox,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: \brief 텍스트 → Double 파싱 후 Min/Max 검증 및 보정 문자열 산출. \Param corrected 보정 결과 문자열(Clamp 시 사용) \return 유효하면 true, 아니면 false

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanConverter
member.summary: Converts between a Boolean value and a string ("1" or "0") representation. This is primarily used for UI bindings where boolean values are stored as string flags in the backend.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a string input (typically "1" or "0") to a boolean value.
member.Param: The value from the source binding, expected to be "1" or "0".
The type of the binding target property.
The culture to use in the converter.
member.returns: True if the value is "1"; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a boolean value back to its string representation ("1" or "0").
member.Param: The value produced by the target binding, expected to be a boolean.
The culture to use in the converter.
member.returns: "1" if true; otherwise, "0".

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanToBrushConverter
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to a Brush based on its State. Commonly used in UI elements to indicate status (e.g., enabled/disabled, active/inactive).

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanToBrushConverter.OnBrush
member.summary: Gets or sets the Brush to use when the boolean value is true.

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanToBrushConverter.OffBrush
member.summary: Gets or sets the Brush to use when the boolean value is false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanToBrushConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to the corresponding Brush.
member.Param: The boolean value from the source binding.
The target type (expected to be Brush).
The culture to use in the converter.
member.returns: OnBrush if true; otherwise, OffBrush.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanToBrushConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: ConvertBack is not supported for this converter.
member.Param: The target value to convert back (unused).
The culture to use in the converter (unused).
member.returns: Binding.DoNothing to indicate conversion is not supported.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanToIconConverter
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to an icon name string for UI representation. Useful for dynamic icon switching in data-bound controls (e.g., check status).

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanToIconConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to an icon name string.
member.Param: The source boolean value from the binding.
The target type of the binding (expected to be string).
The culture info for the conversion.
member.returns: "CheckCircle" if true; "Circle" if false or value is null/invalid.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BooleanToIconConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: ConvertBack is not implemented for this converter.
member.Param: The target value to convert back (unused).
The culture to use in the converter (unused).
member.exception: Always thrown because reverse conversion is not supported.

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BoolToVisibilityConverter.UseHidden
member.summary: \brief When true, returns instead of for false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BoolToVisibilityConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: \brief Converts a boolean value to . \param value The source value from the binding (expected: bool or nullable bool). \param targetType The target type (expected: ). \param parameter Optional parameter to override behavior (e.g., "Inverse", "Hidden", "Inverse,Hidden"). \param culture The culture used in conversion. \return when true; otherwise or .

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BoolToVisibilityConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: \brief Converts back to a boolean value. \details Visible -> true, otherwise false. Applies and optional parameter override. \param value The value from the target (expected: ). \param targetType The target type (expected: bool). \param parameter Optional parameter to override behavior (e.g., "Inverse"). \param culture The culture used in conversion. \return Boolean representation of the visibility state.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.BoolToVisibilityConverter.ApplyOptionsFromParameter(System.Object,System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: \brief Applies converter options from the ConverterParameter. \details Supported parameter forms: - string: "Inverse", "Hidden", "UseHidden", "Inverse,Hidden" - bool: treated as Inverse override - Visibility.Hidden: treated as UseHidden=true \param parameter ConverterParameter object. \param inverse Inverse option (by ref). \param useHidden UseHidden option (by ref).

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.DateTimeToTimeSpanConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: DateTime → TimeSpan 변환

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.DateTimeToTimeSpanConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: TimeSpan → DateTime 변환

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.DoubleEqualsConverter.Min
member.summary: 허용 최소값(없으면 무제한)

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.DoubleEqualsConverter.Max
member.summary: 허용 최대값(없으면 무제한)

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.DoubleEqualsConverter.AllowEmpty
member.summary: 빈 문자열 허용 여부. true면 빈 문자열에서 원본 갱신을 하지 않습니다.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.DoubleToStringConverter
member.summary: Converts a value to a formatted string with three decimal places, and vice versa. Useful for numeric input/display bindings in WPF UIs.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.DoubleToStringConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a to a string formatted with three decimal places.
member.Param: The source value to convert, expected to be a double.
The type of the target property (expected to be string).
The culture to use for formatting.
member.returns: A string formatted as "0.000". If input is invalid, returns "0.000".

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.DoubleToStringConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a string back to a value.
member.Param: The source string to convert back.
The type to convert to (expected to be double).
The culture to use for parsing.
member.returns: The parsed double value, or 0.0 if parsing fails.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.EnumEqualsConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: enum → bool

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.EnumEqualsConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: bool → enum

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.Int64ToInt32Converter
member.summary: Converts a (Int64) value to an (Int32) value for WPF binding scenarios. Handles negative integers by returning 0, and passes through other types unchanged.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.Int64ToInt32Converter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts an Int64 or Int32 value to an Int32 value.
member.Param: The input value, expected to be of type or .
member.returns:
If the value is a long, returns its int cast.
If the value is an int and negative, returns 0.
Otherwise, returns the original value unchanged.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.Int64ToInt32Converter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Passes the input value back without modification. No transformation is applied during reverse conversion.
member.returns: The original value as-is.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.IntEqualsToBoolConverter
member.summary: 정수 값이 ConverterParameter와 같으면 true를 반환하는 컨버터. 라디오버튼 IsChecked ↔ int 속성 바인딩에 사용.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.InverseBooleanConverter
member.summary: Converts boolean or long values by inverting the logical State. - For : returns the negated value. - For : returns true if 0, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.InverseBooleanConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a or value to its inverse representation.
member.Param: The value to convert. Accepts or types.
The target type of the binding (unused).
member.returns:
- If input is : returns true if 0, otherwise false.
- If input is : returns !value.
- Otherwise: returns false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.InverseBooleanConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a value back to its logical inverse, or to a numeric representation if targetType is numeric.
member.Param: The value to convert back. Expected to be a .
member.returns:
- If targetType is numeric: returns 0 if value is true, 1 otherwise.
- If targetType is : returns logical inverse.
- Otherwise: returns 0.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.InverseBoolToVisibilityConverter
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to a enum (inverse of ). Returns Collapsed when true, and Visible when false or null.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.InverseBoolToVisibilityConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to (inverse).
member.Param: The source boolean value from the binding.
The type of the binding target property (expected to be ).
The culture info used in the converter.
member.returns: if true; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.InverseBoolToVisibilityConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: ConvertBack is not supported and will always throw .
member.Param: The target value to convert back (unused).
The culture to use in the converter (unused).
member.returns: This method does not return a value.
member.exception: Always thrown because reverse conversion is not supported.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.LanguageToXmlLanguageConverter
member.summary: → 변환 컨버터. WPF 바인딩에 사용.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.LanguageToXmlLanguageConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Language → XmlLanguage 변환.
member.returns: 해당 언어의 .

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.LanguageToXmlLanguageConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: XmlLanguage → Language 역변환.
member.returns: 해당되는 ; 없으면 기본값.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.LedBrushConverter
member.summary: @brief On/Off에 따라 OnBrush 또는 OffBrush를 선택하는 컨버터. @details MultiBinding 순서: 0: IsOn(bool), 1: OnBrush(Brush), 2: OffBrush(Brush)

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.LedInnerDiameterConverter
member.summary: @brief 내부 원의 지름을 계산합니다. @details MultiBinding 순서: 0: Diameter, 1: InnerScale

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.LedPositionConverter
member.summary: @brief LED 위치 계산 컨버터. @details ConverterParameter: "OuterLeft" | "OuterTop" | "InnerLeft" | "InnerTop" MultiBinding 순서: 0: LedCorner (Corner) 1: double (ActualWidth 또는 ActualHeight) - Parameter에 따라 의미 달라짐 2: double (Diameter) 3: double (EdgeOffset) 4: double (InnerScale) - Inner* 모드에서만 사용

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.NullToVisibilityConverter
member.summary: Converts a value to based on its nullability. - If the value is null, returns Collapsed. - If not null, returns Visible. Supports optional inversion.

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.NullToVisibilityConverter.Inverse
member.summary: If set to true, the result is inverted. - null → Visible - not null → Collapsed

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.NullToVisibilityConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a value to based on whether it is null.
member.Param: The bound value to check for null.
member.returns: if value is not null (or null if Inverse=true); otherwise, .

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.NullToVisibilityConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Not supported. Reverse conversion is not implemented.
member.returns: This method does not return.

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.StringToDoubleConverter.Fallback
member.summary: The value to return when parsing fails.

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.StringToDoubleConverter.Format
member.summary: The format string to use when converting a double to string in . If empty or null, "G" (general format) is used. Examples: "0.###", "0.000"

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.StringToDoubleConverter.UseInvariantCulture
member.summary: Determines whether to always use . If true, a '.' is always used as the decimal separator.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.StringToDoubleConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a string to a double.
member.Param: The culture provided by the binding.
member.returns: The parsed double value, or if parsing fails.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.StringToDoubleConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a double to a formatted string.
member.Param: The culture provided by the binding.
member.returns: The formatted string representation of the double value.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Converters.TimeSpanHmEditConverter
T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.DreamineLocalization
member.summary: WPF 컨트롤에 다국어 텍스트를 적용하는 첨부 프로퍼티 모음.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.Language
member.summary: 지원 언어.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.TextcaseType
member.summary: 텍스트 케이스 변환 방식.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.DreamineLocalizationManager
member.summary: INI/딕셔너리 기반 다국어 문자열 관리자. Load() 대신 SetLanguageData()로 미리 파싱된 데이터를 주입할 수 있다.

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.DreamineLocalizationManager.CurrentLanguage
member.summary: 현재 선택된 언어. 변경 시 LanguageChanged 이벤트 발생.

member.name: E:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.DreamineLocalizationManager.LanguageChanged
member.summary: CurrentLanguage 변경 시 발생.

member.name: P:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.DreamineLocalizationManager.Languages
member.summary: 로드된 언어 딕셔너리. [Language][Section][Key] = LocalizedValue
미리 파싱된 딕셔너리로 언어 데이터를 주입한다. INI 파서 없이도 동작하도록 Dreamine 방식으로 단순화된 진입점.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.DreamineLocalizationManager.Load(System.Func{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}}},Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.Language,System.String)
member.summary: 외부 INI 로더 훅을 통해 데이터를 로드한다. loadFn: (filePath) → [Section][Key]=Value

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.DreamineLocalizationManager.Get(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 현재 언어에서 섹션/키로 번역 문자열을 반환.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.DreamineLocalizationManager.Get(Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.Language,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 지정 언어에서 섹션/키로 번역 문자열을 반환.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.DreamineLocalizationManager.GetKeyFromValue(Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.Language,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 값으로 키를 역조회.

member.name: M:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.DreamineLocalizationManager.GetLocalizedEquivalent(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 이전 언어의 값을 현재 언어로 변환.

member.name: T:Dreamine.UI.Wpf.Localization.StaticLocalizationProxy
member.summary: XAML 바인딩을 위한 싱글턴 프록시.
